title: NBAIR Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional-I Posts
description: The National Bureau of Agricultural Insect Resources (NBAIR) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Young Professional- I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, B.Sc., can apply for the NBAIR Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selec...
